content.en: Simultaneous MBR destruction at 14:00 on March 20

content.ko: 약 32,000여 대 PC·서버 부팅 불능 상태

content.en: Government issued 'Caution' level cyber crisis alert

ko: 패치 관리 시스템(PMS) 자체가 공격 경로로 악용
내부 단말과 서버 간 망 분리 미흡
en: Patch management system (PMS) itself was exploited as an attack vector
Insufficient network segmentation between endpoints and servers
No endpoint backup and recovery system in place
Keep OS and antivirus up to date
Do not execute attachments from unknown sources

ko: PMS 등 운영 시스템 자체에 대한 보안 강화
내부망과 인터넷 망 분리 정책 수립
중요 시스템 부트 영역 무결성 검증
en: Harden the security of operational systems like PMS
Establish network segregation policy between internal and internet networks
Implement automated endpoint backup and recovery
Verify boot sector integrity on critical systems
